response.justification: Bogdan significantly exceeds the 15-year experience requirement (20 years) with strong full-stack and infrastructure capabilities, entrepreneurial founding experience, and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure. However, the role is specifically titled "AI Strategy" and requires "recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI." His AI expertise is nascent and recent; his career has been generalist software engineering. He lacks the specialized AI/ML background (no advanced degree in AI) and demonstrated AI products that the role emphasizes. He's a strong principal engineer candidate for general software, but may lack the deep AI strategy focus this specific role requires.
strengths: Exceeds minimum 15-year requirement with 20 years of progressive technical experience across infrastructure, full-stack development, and systems design
Demonstrates builder mentality and entrepreneurial capability through founding GISCollective and multiple side projects with real adoption
Strong foundation in cloud (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) and infrastructure, with recent exposure to AI-agent frameworks (MCP code generators)
concerns: AI expertise is recent and limited; no Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field (preferred qualification), and no demonstrated record of AI products or platforms
Background is primarily generalist full-stack software engineering rather than specialized AI/ML expertise required for "AI Strategy" focus
No clear evidence of direction-level leadership, strategic advisory experience, or thought leadership in AI innovation expected at principal engineer level

key_factors.factor: Limited AI specialization and demonstrated products
Recent AI infrastructure work shows emerging relevant expertise
